31595.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Pizza, Roulade & Madeira Cake
31595.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.
